lines.pinyin: wo men jin sheng you yuan zai lu shang
lines.translation: We are destined to meet on this road through life

lines.pinyin: zhi yao wo men bi ci yong bu wang
lines.translation: As long as we never forget each other

lines.hanzi: 朋友啊让我们一起牢牢铭记呀
lines.pinyin: peng you a rang wo men yi qi lao lao ming ji ya
lines.translation: Friends, let us hold this firmly in our hearts together

lines.pinyin: bie zai hu na yi xie you he shang
lines.translation: Don't dwell on the sorrows and wounds

lines.hanzi: 朋友啊让我们一起牢牢铭记
lines.pinyin: peng you a rang wo men yi qi lao lao ming ji
lines.translation: Friends, let us hold this firmly in our hearts together

lines.pinyin: bie zai hu na yi xie you he shang
lines.translation: Don't dwell on the sorrows and wounds

lines.pinyin: wo men jin sheng zhu ding shi cang sang
lines.translation: In this life we are destined to face hardship

lines.pinyin: ku zhe lai yao xiao zhe zou guo ya
lines.translation: We come in tears, but must walk away with a smile

lines.hanzi: 朋友啊让我们一起牢牢铭记呀
lines.pinyin: peng you a rang wo men yi qi lao lao ming ji ya
lines.translation: Friends, let us hold this firmly in our hearts together

lines.pinyin: wo men jin sheng xiong di qing yi chang
lines.translation: The bond between us runs deep through this lifetime

lines.hanzi: 朋友啊让我们一起牢牢铭记呀
lines.pinyin: peng you a rang wo men yi qi lao lao ming ji ya
lines.translation: Friends, let us hold this firmly in our hearts together

lines.translation: The bond between us runs deep through this lifetime

lines.translation: As long as we never forget each other

lines.hanzi: 朋友啊让我们一起牢牢铭记呀
lines.pinyin: peng you a rang wo men yi qi lao lao ming ji ya
lines.translation: Friends, let us hold this firmly in our hearts together

lines.pinyin: bie zai hu na yi xie you he shang
lines.translation: Don't dwell on the sorrows and wounds

lines.hanzi: 朋友啊让我们一起牢牢铭记呀
lines.pinyin: peng you a rang wo men yi qi lao lao ming ji ya
lines.translation: Friends, let us hold this firmly in our hearts together

lines.pinyin: bie zai hu na yi xie you he shang
lines.translation: Don't dwell on the sorrows and wounds

lines.pinyin: wo men jin sheng jiu xiang meng yi chang
lines.translation: This life of ours is like a dream

lines.pinyin: you ni pei he zui le you he fang
lines.translation: With you beside me, what's wrong with drinking till we're drunk

lines.hanzi: 朋友啊让我们一起牢牢铭记呀
lines.pinyin: peng you a rang wo men yi qi lao lao ming ji ya
lines.translation: Friends, let us hold this firmly in our hearts together

lines.pinyin: fan chen guo hou zhong liao wu qian gua
lines.translation: When the worldly dust has settled, there's nothing left to cling to
